phrases.intent_en: Where is the gift shop by the exit
phrases.text_local: Kde je obchod se suvenýry u východu?
phrases.cultural_note: Museum gift shops in the Czech Republic are often placed after the last exhibition room, forcing visitors to walk through the entire collection.

likely_response.local: Projděte výstavou, je až na konci.
likely_response.translation_en: Go through the exhibition, it is at the very end.

responses.english: Go through the exhibition, it is at the very end.
responses.french: Projděte výstavou, je až na konci.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Sternberg Madonna on display now
phrases.cultural_note: The Sternberg Madonna is a prized permanent exhibit. Staff typically confirm its location rather than just saying 'yes'.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is in the medieval exhibition.

responses.english: Yes, it is in the medieval exhibition.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent the audio guide
phrases.cultural_note: In Czech museums, audio guides are almost always rented at the main ticket counter (pokladna), not a separate desk.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket desk, right by the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket desk, right by the entrance.
